title: Single Lady
original_title: ซิงเกิลเลดี้ เพราะเคยมีแฟน
overview: Successful author and media darling Bright is an icon of singledom. However, a fortune-teller's warning of dire consequences resulting from unresolved issues with former lovers forces her to revisit and reexamine her five past relationships and calls her renunciation of romance into question.
